'''Mupples''' were small furry creatures that were imprisoned at the [[new Umboo Lightstation]] when [[Mungo Baobab]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] rescued them. Some considered Mupples a delicacy.

==Behind the scenes==
The Mupples seem to resemble the [[MemoryAlpha:Tribble|Tribble]] species from the [[Memoryalpha:Star Trek|''Star Trek'']] original series episode "[[MemoryAlpha:The Trouble with Tribbles|The Trouble with Tribbles]]."

Though its relation to the species is unclear, [[Mupple juice]] makes an appearance in the next episode, "[[The Roon Games]]."

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|Tail of the Roon Comets}} {{1st}}
*''[[Escape from the Monster Ship: A Droid Adventure]]'' {{C|adaptation of "Tail of the Roon Comets"}}
